text_block_list.text:
One day, as I was passing behind the school
building...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Oh, it's you, Trainer. Don't surprise me like that.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I'm fine. I had the same pain this morning, but it
subsided quickly. In fact—

text_block_list.name: King Halo's Followers
text_block_list.text: There you are, King! We were looking for you!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I'm sorry for disappearing all of a sudden. I
got sidetracked.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I'll heading to the plaza soon, so could you guys
go on ahead?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Let's not tell them anything. I don't like people worrying
about me.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I'll definitely let everyone know when I'm really not
feeling well. There's no need to worry.

King Halo seems to be suffering from a
headache...
